nodes.label: Fine-tuning Strategy Overview by Dataset Availability (v9)
nodes.rationale: Shows 3 experimental setups on a data-availability spectrum: Setup 1 (single labelled dataset, supervised fine-tuning), Setup 2 (multiple labelled datasets for different tasks, prompt-based fine-tuning with box/point prompts), Setup 3 (multiple unlabelled datasets for task-agnostic self-supervised pretraining + task-specific labelled dataset for supervised fine-tuning)

edges.source_location: Setup 3: task-agnostic self-supervised method on multiple datasets (image only)
